title: Corrupting my excel file when adding data
author: Daxelarne

comments.author: zurmokeeper
comments.body: @Daxelarne Can you provide the excel file?

comments.author: nautna
comments.body:
The linked SO post shows that the OP has resolved the issue: https://stackoverflow.com/a/76382949. This should be able to be closed.

> I found out it was because this was an Excel table.
[There's the documentation](https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs#tables) to use the table with ExcelJS and should have used table.addRow() to add data in the table
I just edited my file to remove the table and it also works.
